zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Sotherton於1490年出生在英國諾福爾可諾維其時，他的父親Sir Thomas Herman Sotherton25歲，母親Elizabeth Luddham24歲。他於大約1504年與Agnes Wright在英國英格蘭諾福爾可諾維其結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1540年11月10日在英國諾福爾可享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭可瓦爾聖 約翰。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Sotherton于1490年出生在英国諾福爾可諾維其时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Herman Sotherton25岁，母亲Elizabeth Luddham24岁。他于大约1504年与Agnes Wright在英国英格兰諾福爾可諾維其结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1540年11月10日在英国諾福爾可享年50岁，埋葬在英国英格兰可瓦爾聖 約翰。

nameMeanings.name: Sotherton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Southerton
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more places called Southerton or Sotherton, including Sotherton (Suffolk), which derives from Old English sūtherra ‘southern, southerly’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Sotherton was born in 1490, in Norwich, Norfolk, England, his father, Sir Thomas Herman Sotherton, was 25 and his mother, Elizabeth Luddham, was 24. He married Agnes Wright about 1504, in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 10 November 1540, in Norfolk, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in St John, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Sotherton est né en 1490, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Herman Sotherton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Luddham, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Wright environ 1504, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 10 novembre 1540, à Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à St John, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Sotherton 1490 in Norwich, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Herman Sotherton 25 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Luddham 24. Er hat um 1504 in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Agnes Wright geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 10. November 1540 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Norfolk, England und wurde in St John, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Sotherton è nato il nel 1490 nel Norwich, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Herman Sotherton, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Luddham, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Wright circa 1504, nel Norwich, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 10 novembre 1540, nel Norfolk, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a St John, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Sothertonが1490年にイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Herman Sothertonは25歳，母Elizabeth Luddhamは24歳であった。約1504年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチでAgnes Wrightと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1540年11月10日にイギリスノーフォルクで50歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスコルンワルスト ジョンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Sotherton(이)가 1490년 영국 노르폴크 노위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Herman Sotherton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Luddham(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1504년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 노위치에서 Agnes Wright(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1540년 11월 10일 영국 노르폴크에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트 존에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Sotherton nasceu em 1490, em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Herman Sotherton, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Luddham, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Wright aproximadamente 1504, em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de novembro de 1540, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em St John, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Sotherton родился в 1490 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Herman Sotherton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Luddham, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Wright около 1504 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 10 ноября 1540 г. в местности норфолк, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности ст джон, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Sotherton nació en 1490, en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Herman Sotherton, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Luddham, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Agnes Wright aproximadamente 1504, en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 10 de noviembre de 1540, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en St John, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
